title: AWI Earth System Complexity
text: The Earth System Complexity group at the Alfred Wegener Institute investigates the dynamics, feedbacks, and tipping behaviour of the climate system across timescales — from past glacial cycles to future projections.

title: AWI Earth System Complexity
text:
What we do
We combine process-based modelling, Earth observation, and statistical methods to understand how complexity emerges in the climate system. Our work spans ice-sheet dynamics, paleoclimate reconstruction, ocean–cryosphere interactions, and the development of efficient simulation tools.

title: AWI Earth System Complexity
text:
Where to find us
Alfred Wegener Institute, Helmholtz Centre for Polar and Marine Research Bremerhaven, Germany
